hero.description: Building scalable, high-performance web applications with modern technologies. Focused on creating exceptional user experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a passionate Software Engineer with a strong foundation in building modern web applications. My journey in tech is driven by a curiosity to understand how things work and a desire to create solutions that make a difference.
about.p2: With expertise in both frontend and backend development, I enjoy tackling complex problems and turning ideas into robust, scalable software. I thrive in collaborative environments and am always eager to learn new technologies.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Platform
ecommerce.description: A full-featured online store with cart functionality, payment gateway, and admin dashboard.

taskApp.title: Task Management App
taskApp.description: Collaborative project management tool with real-time updates and drag-and-drop interface.

finance.title: Finance Dashboard
finance.description: Data visualization dashboard for tracking personal expenses and investments.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to chat? I'd love to hear from you.
